calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Sep-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Prior to Open Court, PLaintiff's counsel Helen Chang appears and requests a 1-2 week continuance of the motion while a settlement agreement is pending to be signed. The clerk informs the Court. At the instruction of the court, the clerk informs Counsel the request to continue is denied and the tentative ruling stands.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ITRIA VENTURES LLC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.

Plaintiff Itria Ventures LLC's unopposed Motion for Summary Adjudication is GRANTED.

Plaintiff carried its initial burden to establish each element of its causes of action for breach of contract and breach of guarantee entitling it to judgment on its third and fourth causes of action respectively. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 437c(p)(1); UMF ## 1-11.) The record does not support the viability of any defense to either claim. The court summarily adjudicates Plaintiff's third and fourth causes of action in favor of Plaintiffs and against Defendants.

Notably, no defendant submitted any evidence or argument against Plaintiff's motion for summary adjudication of the third and fourth causes of action. (See California Rules of Court, rule 8.54(c) [party's failure to oppose a motion may be considered consent to the granting of the motion]. )

The third cause of action (breach of contract) is summarily adjudicated in Itria's favor against Merchant Defendant in the amount of $178,548.16. The fourth cause of action (breach of guarantee) is summarily adjudicated in Itria's favor against the Guarantors in the amount of $178,548.16.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-26-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
